userMessage: Add overshoot and undershoot on CH1, then query both results

response.text:
I built the flow as a full replacement with verified CH1 positive- and negative-overshoot measurements plus separate result queries.

ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Replace the empty workspace with a verified MSO4/5/6 pyvisa flow that adds CH1 positive overshoot and negative overshoot measurements and queries both results.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":["Auto-repaired missing/duplicate step ids in replace_flow actions for apply compatibility.","Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias \"scope1\" for direct chat apply compatibility."],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"CH1 Overshoot and Undershoot Measurements","description":"Connect to the scope, add CH1 positive overshoot and negative overshoot measurements, query both current-acquisition mean results, and disconnect.","backend":"pyvisa","deviceType":"SCOPE","steps":[{"type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"],"printIdn":true},"id":"s1_1"},{"type":"group","label":"Add Measurements","params":{},"collapsed":false,"children":[{"type":"write","label":"Add CH1 Positive Overshoot","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:ADDMEAS POVERSHOOT;MEASUrement:MEAS1:SOUrce1 CH1"},"id":"s1_3"},{"type":"write","label":"Add CH1 Negative Overshoot","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:ADDMEAS NOVERSHOOT;MEASUrement:MEAS2:SOUrce1 CH1"},"id":"s1_4"},{"type":"error_check","label":"Error Check","params":{"command":"ALLEV?"},"id":"s1_5"}],"id":"g1_2"},{"type":"group","label":"Read Results","params":{},"collapsed":false,"children":[{"type":"query","label":"Query CH1 Positive Overshoot","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS1:RESUlts:CURRentacq:MEAN?","saveAs":"meas1_povershoot"},"id":"s1_7"},{"type":"query","label":"Query CH1 Negative Overshoot","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS2:RESUlts:CURRentacq:MEAN?","saveAs":"meas2_novershoot"},"id":"s1_8"}],"id":"g1_6"},{"type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"]},"id":"s1_9"}]}}]}

actionsJson.summary: Replace the empty workspace with a verified MSO4/5/6 pyvisa flow that adds CH1 positive overshoot and negative overshoot measurements and queries both results.
suggestedFixes: Auto-repaired missing/duplicate step ids in replace_flow actions for apply compatibility.
Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias "scope1" for direct chat apply compatibility.

flow.name: CH1 Overshoot and Undershoot Measurements
